topic: PCOS and insulin resistance — the metabolic connection
caption: Did you know 70% of women with PCOS develop insulin resistance? 🌟 Save this to understand the metabolic link. Insulin resistance can increase androgen production, worsening PCOS symptoms. 💡 Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. 💖👍🏽💸
